title: Autonomous-Dev Deploy Configuration v1
description: Validates the YAML at <repo>/.autonomous-dev/deploy.yaml. Cross-reference: TDD-023 §9, SPEC-023-2-01.

version.description: Schema version. Only '1.0' is supported by the resolver in PLAN-023-2.

default_backend.description: Backend name used when an environment does not declare its own. Resolver consults this only when env.backend is absent.

parameters.description: Repo-level parameters merged underneath each environment's parameters (shallow merge).

environments.description: Map of environment name to environment config. Names match ^(dev|staging|prod|[a-z][a-z0-9_-]{0,30})$.

backend.description: Backend name as registered in BackendRegistry.

parameters.description: Environment-specific parameters; overrides repo-level parameters key-by-key (shallow merge).

approval.description: Required approval level before the deploy phase invokes the backend.

cost_cap_usd.description: Per-deploy daily cost cap in USD. 0 means no cap.

auto_promote_from.description: Optional source environment name; promotion logic is documented out-of-scope for PLAN-023-2.
